examples: Mulberry bacterial disease is one of the main diseases. It occurred widely and influenced the sericultural production great- ly.
Mulberry bacterial disease is the major and serious disease that does harm to the twigs and leaves of mulberry, and is widespread in sericultural areas.
The new mulberry varieties bred by The Sericultural Research Institute of Shandong, which originated from the endemic mulberry varieties of Shandong, inherit the good points of the parent.
